description: Hand-labelled candidate pairs for the suggestion-quality eval. Each pair is an ANCHOR note and a CANDIDATE note (by corpus filename stem, no .md) plus a gold verdict: either "decline" (no typed connection a careful author would record) or { "connect": [verbs] } listing every DEFENSIBLE core verb for the anchor->candidate direction, most-apt first. Verb accuracy credits any verb in the set (the vocabulary genuinely overlaps); firing precision/recall only care about connect-vs-decline. `evidence` is the candidate passage that 'surfaced' the pair (stands in for candidate-gen's max-sim chunk); when omitted the candidate's first paragraph is used. `note` is a labeller comment, ignored by scoring. Declines deliberately include same-topic-but-not-connected traps, since over-firing is the relator's primary failure mode.

pairs.evidence: forcing hot water under high pressure through a compact puck of finely ground beans
pairs.note: grind-size details the extraction espresso defines

pairs.evidence: forcing hot water under high pressure through a compact puck of finely ground beans
pairs.note: channeling is a named failure mode of espresso extraction
crema is the layer that sits on an espresso shot

pairs.evidence: pressure methods force it through a compact puck quickly
pairs.note: espresso is one concrete brewing method

pairs.evidence: Immersion methods steep grounds in water
pairs.note: cold brew is a concrete immersion method

pairs.evidence: Stimulants late in the day, irregular schedules, and bright displays before bed are common aggravating factors
pairs.note: the pharmacology explains why caffeine aggravates insomnia

pairs.evidence: trouble falling asleep or staying asleep
pairs.note: sleep hygiene is the set of practices aimed at insomnia

pairs.evidence: a late cup can delay sleep onset
pairs.note: sleep hygiene advises avoiding late caffeine

pairs.evidence: link notes densely so that trains of thought accrete over time
pairs.note: evergreen notes build directly on the slip-box tradition

pairs.evidence: give each note a unique identifier
pairs.note: the vault is a zettelkasten adapted to Markdown

pairs.evidence: dietary saturated fat raises blood LDL cholesterol, which in turn drives atherosclerosis and coronary heart disease
pairs.note: the trial is clinical evidence for the hypothesis

pairs.evidence: dietary saturated fat raises blood LDL cholesterol
pairs.note: the reappraisal argues against the hypothesis
HTTP/2 replaces HTTP/1.1's serialized model
recall test: a genuine thematic link, not a strong verb
hard: sibling brewing methods, neither references the other
hard: both concern espresso, not each other
medium: adjacent via caffeine, but no direct typed link
hard: direction — the hypothesis does not cite or support the later trial (reverse of the supports pair)
easy: unrelated
easy: unrelated
easy: unrelated
